title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14 as the Colosseum battle intensifies as Bartolomeo’s strange power and cruel reputation become impossible to ignore.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: "Three fighters have fallen from the ring! They're disqualified!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: But naturally, in the waters surrounding the ring....!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: It's hell. Both in and out of the ring!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There's just no emerging from this fight unscathed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't turn your back to me Shihahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Fishmen shouldn't stick their noses where they don't belong....!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: You've no business entering a tournament for humans, Monster!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just a dullard with no conviction behind his words...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: At least try communicating with your fists !!!!!

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
